title: M&G CORRECTION TAPE ( EFFORTLESS ) 20M X 5MM
subtitle: M&G CORRECTION TAPE (
overview: M&G Effortless Series Correction Tape features a three-gear structure for smoother and more stable tape movement, reducing the risk of jamming during use. The rotatable structure is designed to adjust tape tension, keeping the tape tight and preventing it from loosening. The adjustable guide head helps the tape adhere neatly to the paper surface, resulting in cleaner corrections. With a 5mm tape width and available in 20m lengths, it is suitable for students and office use, and allows instant write-over. Highlights Effortless Series Correction Tape Three-gear structure for smooth & stable tape movement Rotatable tension adjuster prevents tape from loosening Adjustable guide head for neat and precise correction 5mm tape width Instant write-over after correction Ideal for students & office use Packaging (Card Packing) Size: L 8.5 cm × W 1.7 cm × H 16 cm Weight: 30.7 g
